requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety and Installation — NBC 2016 Part 4 + CEA Safety Regulations
requirement_topic.zh: 消防安全与安装 — NBC 2016第4部分 + CEA安全条例
requirement_topic.zht: 消防安全與安裝 — NBC 2016第4部分 + CEA安全條例

summary.en: Fire safety for battery energy storage systems in India is governed by the National Building Code (NBC) 2016 Part 4 (Fire and Life Safety), which covers fire protection requirements for electrical energy storage installations in buildings and industrial premises. The CEA (Measures relating to Safety and Electric Supply) Regulations 2010 set mandatory electrical safety standards for construction, operation, and maintenance of electrical plants and lines, including BESS installations. Applicable State Electricity Regulatory Commission (SERC) distribution, supply, and grid codes may add state-level interconnection, metering, protection, and operational requirements. IS 15652: 2006 specifies requirements for insulating mats used in electrical installations. State fire authority approvals (NOC) are typically required for large BESS installations. Fire suppression system specifications and clearances follow NBC 2016 Part 4 and the applicable local fire brigade requirements.
summary.zh: 印度电池储能系统的消防安全受《国家建筑规范》（NBC）2016第4部分（消防与生命安全）规范，该规范涵盖建筑和工业场所内电力储能设施的消防保护要求。《CEA（电力安全与供应相关措施）条例2010》为包括BESS安装在内的电气设备的建设、运营和维护设定了强制性电气安全标准。适用的州电力监管委员会（SERC）配电、供电和电网规范可能增加州级并网、计量、保护和运行要求。IS 15652: 2006规定了电气安装中绝缘垫的要求。大型BESS安装通常须取得州消防局审批（无异议证明）。灭火系统规格和间距遵循NBC 2016第4部分及当地消防部门适用要求。
summary.zht: 印度電池儲能系統的消防安全受《國家建築規範》（NBC）2016第4部分（消防與生命安全）規範，該規範涵蓋建築和工業場所內電力儲能設施的消防保護要求。《CEA（電力安全與供應相關措施）條例2010》為包括BESS安裝在內的電氣設備的建設、運營和維護設定了強制性電氣安全標準。適用的州電力監管委員會（SERC）配電、供電和電網規範可能增加州級併網、計量、保護和運行要求。IS 15652: 2006規定了電氣安裝中絕緣墊的要求。大型BESS安裝通常須取得州消防局審批（無異議證明）。滅火系統規格和間距遵循NBC 2016第4部分及當地消防部門適用要求。

standards_or_laws: National Building Code (NBC) 2016 Part 4 — Fire and Life Safety (Bureau of Indian Standards)
CEA (Measures relating to Safety and Electric Supply) Regulations 2010
Applicable SERC distribution, supply, and grid codes
IS 15652: 2006 — Insulating mats for electrical purposes

summary.en: China's fire and installation requirements for stationary BESS are governed by GB/T 42288-2022 (Safety Code for Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations, effective July 2023), which covers fire suppression system design, BMS-to-fire-detection linkage, and emergency procedures. GB 50016-2014 (Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings, 2018 revision) provides general building fire-protection design requirements applicable to BESS enclosures. NB/T 42091-2016 covers the technical specifications for electrochemical energy storage systems. China's GB operational fire-safety and building codes are not accepted by Indian authorities as substitutes for NBC 2016 Part 4 compliance or state fire NOC requirements.
summary.zh: 中国固定式BESS的消防与安装要求受GB/T 42288-2022（电化学储能电站安全规程，2023年7月起施行）规范，涵盖灭火系统设计、BMS与火灾探测联动及应急处置程序。GB 50016-2014（建筑设计防火规范，2018年修订版）提供适用于BESS机房的通用建筑消防设计要求。NB/T 42091-2016涵盖电化学储能系统技术规范。中国GB运营消防安全规范和建筑规范不被印度当局接受为NBC 2016第4部分合规或州消防无异议证明要求的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國固定式BESS的消防與安裝要求受GB/T 42288-2022（電化學儲能電站安全規程，2023年7月起施行）規範，涵蓋滅火系統設計、BMS與火災探測聯動及應急處置程序。GB 50016-2014（建築設計防火規範，2018年修訂版）提供適用於BESS機房的通用建築消防設計要求。NB/T 42091-2016涵蓋電化學儲能系統技術規範。中國GB運營消防安全規範和建築規範不被印度當局接受為NBC 2016第4部分合規或州消防無異議證明要求的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 42288-2022 — 电化学储能电站安全规程（Safety Code for Electrochemical Energy Storage Stations, effective July 1, 2023)
GB 50016-2014 (2018 revision) — 建筑设计防火规范（Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings)

gap.en: Indian NBC 2016 Part 4 and state fire authority NOC requirements must be satisfied independently of Chinese GB fire-safety certifications. There is no mutual recognition between Indian building/fire codes and Chinese GB standards for BESS installation fire safety. BESS installations in India must comply with CEA 2010 electrical safety regulations and applicable SERC distribution, supply, and grid codes. State-level fire NOC and SERC code processes vary across Indian states, adding layers of local approval and operational requirements not required in China's unified national framework.
gap.zh: 印度NBC 2016第4部分和州消防局无异议证明要求须独立于中国GB消防安全认证另行满足。印度建筑/消防规范与中国GB标准之间不存在针对BESS安装消防安全的互认协议。印度境内的BESS安装须符合CEA 2010电气安全条例及适用的SERC配电、供电和电网规范。各印度州的消防无异议证明和SERC规范程序有所不同，增加了中国统一国家框架下不需要的地方审批和运行要求。
gap.zht: 印度NBC 2016第4部分和州消防局無異議證明要求須獨立於中國GB消防安全認證另行滿足。印度建築/消防規範與中國GB標準之間不存在針對BESS安裝消防安全的互認協議。印度境內的BESS安裝須符合CEA 2010電氣安全條例及適用的SERC配電、供電和電網規範。各印度州的消防無異議證明和SERC規範程序有所不同，增加了中國統一國家框架下不需要的地方審批和運行要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (NBC 2016 Part 4 fire compliance and CEA 2010 electrical safety regulations required; state fire NOC typically required for large BESS installations)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market (GB/T 42288-2022 operational safety code; GB 50016-2014 building fire code)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS installations in India must comply with NBC 2016 Part 4, CEA (Measures relating to Safety and Electric Supply) Regulations 2010, and applicable SERC distribution, supply, and grid codes. Chinese GB fire-safety certifications and operational safety codes do not substitute for Indian building-code compliance, CEA electrical-safety compliance, SERC code compliance, or state fire NOC approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在印度的中国BESS安装须符合NBC 2016第4部分、《CEA（电力安全与供应相关措施）条例2010》及适用的SERC配电、供电和电网规范。中国GB消防安全认证和运营安全规程不能替代印度建筑规范合规、CEA电气安全合规、SERC规范合规或州消防无异议证明审批。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在印度的中國BESS安裝須符合NBC 2016第4部分、《CEA（電力安全與供應相關措施）條例2010》及適用的SERC配電、供電和電網規範。中國GB消防安全認證和運營安全規程不能替代印度建築規範合規、CEA電氣安全合規、SERC規範合規或州消防無異議證明審批。
